title: Glass Dessert Bowls Sundae Ice Cream Set of 6 Short Stemmed Tulip Prawn Cocktail Glasses Appetiser Fruit Salads Pudding Dishes Footed Dessert Sundae Cocktail Bowls
features: Set of 6 high quality glass dessert bowls to show off your sweet desserts. Perfect for serving ice cream, sundae's, fruit salad, appetisers, puddings and many other desserts.

Elegant Presentation – Uniquely styled dessert bowls ideal for presenting a range of desserts no matter what the setting. A clear glass contemporary structure with a stemmed base will make your dessert look finest and impress your guests. Ideal for parties, dinners, events & festive occasions.

Durable Glass Structure – Strong glass designed with a long lasting finish to make these dessert bowls remain a crisp clear condition after numerous uses and repeated washes. With hygienic non porous and inert properties of glass, with these bowls your desserts will always remain fresh from when there dished up to being served.

Space Saving Storage - Along with being a practical tool for serving tasty small foods and desserts; these dessert bowls are also provide easy stackable storage to ensure your cupboards remain neat and tidy.
description: Product Description 6-Piece Classic Design Upgrade your dessert presentation with these high-quality glass bowls. The set includes 6 bowls, perfect for showcasing your sweet desserts, such as ice cream, sundaes, fruit salad, appetizers, puddings and many other desserts. With the size of 8.5 x 9cm, these bowls are the perfect size for a range of desserts. Entertain in Style Impress your guests with the elegant appearance of these dessert bowls. Uniquely styled, with a clear glass contemporary structure and a stemmed base, these bowls are ideal for any setting, from parties and dinners to events and festive occasions. Made to Last Enjoy long-lasting durability with these dessert bowls. The strong glass structure is designed to maintain a crisp, clear condition even after multiple uses and washes. Glass is also non-porous and inert which makes them hygienic and easy to clean, ensuring that your desserts will always stay fresh. Plus, they are stackable for easy storage in kitchen cabinets!
